title: Instagram Connection
lead_connected: Customer Direct messages will enter CRM, and operator replies will be sent back to Instagram.
lead_connected_success: You can now test the flow by sending a Direct message from another account.
lead_disconnected: After connection, new Direct messages will automatically open cases in CRM.
lead_disconnected_success: New messages from this Instagram account will no longer enter this integration.
lead_confirm_disconnect: After disconnecting, new messages will stop entering this integration. Existing CRM case history stays in place.
lead_conflict: The selected Instagram account is already used by another connected integration.
lead_error: Check the integration settings and try again.
lead_inactive: Enable the integration in CRM, then return to this page.
lead_missing_context: To connect an account, open this page from the connected integration card.
lead_unavailable: The service could not prepare the connection. Try again later or contact an administrator.
heading_oauth_error: Instagram did not confirm the connection
lead_oauth_error: Try connecting again and approve access in the Instagram window.
lead_session_expired: Return to the integration and start the connection again.
notice_connected_success: Connection is complete. If a test message does not appear in CRM, check message access in Instagram settings.
notice_disconnected_success: You can reconnect this account later if needed.
notice_confirm_disconnect: Disconnect only if you want to stop receiving and sending messages for this integration.
notice_conflict: One Instagram account can be active in only one connected integration. Disconnect it there or choose another account.
notice_error: Settings are incomplete or the connection service is unavailable.
notice_pipeline_required: Select a CRM pipeline for Instagram cases.
notice_channel_required: Select a CRM channel for Instagram cases.
notice_service_unavailable: Instagram connection is not available yet. Contact an administrator.
notice_authorization_required: Connect an Instagram account to start receiving and sending messages.
notice_disconnect_failed: Could not disconnect the Instagram account. Try again.
notice_invalid_disconnect: Disconnect confirmation has expired. Press Disconnect again.
step_save_settings: First select the pipeline and CRM channel in the integration settings.
step_connect_account: Press the connect button and approve access to the professional Instagram account.
step_send_test_message: After connecting, send a test Direct message from another account.
step_connected_messages: New customer messages will enter an active case or create a new one.
step_connected_reply: CRM operator replies are sent to the same Direct conversation.
step_connected_disconnect: To connect this Instagram to another integration, disconnect it here first.
step_disconnect_stop: New inbound messages will stop entering this integration.
step_disconnect_history: Existing CRM customers, cases, and messages are not deleted.
step_disconnect_reconnect: The account can be connected again after disconnecting.
step_conflict_other: Open the integration where this Instagram account is already connected.
step_conflict_disconnect: Disconnect the account there if you want to move it here.
step_conflict_choose: Or repeat connection and choose another Instagram account.
step_error_settings: Check that the pipeline and CRM channel are selected.
step_error_retry: Refresh the page and try the action again.
step_error_admin: If the error repeats, contact an administrator.
